dimensions.label: Single-playbook discipline
dimensions.pass_rule: Exactly one routes.json playbook loaded; no cross-cluster reads.

dimensions.label: Contract shape
dimensions.pass_rule: Output matches the active playbook's output-contract and templates/output.md headings.

dimensions.label: Evidence-tied claims
dimensions.pass_rule: Every specific claim references a supplied evidence id or is marked open; no fabricated numbers, FX, market data, settlement amounts, or competing offers.

dimensions.label: Single tag family
dimensions.pass_rule: One family throughout (authoring or provenance); consistent ES/EN spelling; no mixing.

dimensions.label: Determinism
dimensions.pass_rule: Identical input yields byte-identical output; ISO dates only; relative dates block.

dimensions.label: Stop-on-empty
dimensions.pass_rule: Missing critical input triggers {VACIO_CRITICO} halt instead of auto-fill.

dimensions.label: Governance
dimensions.pass_rule: No PII echoed, single brand, no green-as-success, no FOMO/servility in gratitude or counterproposal text.

verdict_rule: All gate dimensions must pass; any fail blocks the deliverable.
